subcodes.first_line: O spiritual and enkindled leaf! Like unto a nightingale in the rose-garden of the Most Exalted Kingdom, lift up thy voice in praise of the Abhá Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه روحانیه چون بلبل گلشن ملکوت اعلی بستایش جمال ابهی نطق بگشا و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @music and singing, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
